name: Kulicke & Soffa Industries, Inc.
description: Kulicke & Soffa Industries, Inc. is a leading global provider of semiconductor and electronic assembly solutions. Founded in 1951, the company specializes in developing advanced equipment and tools for semiconductor packaging, including ball bonding, wedge bonding, and advanced dispensing technologies. Serving a diverse range of sectors such as automotive, communications, and industrial electronics, Kulicke & Soffa focuses on driving innovation in assembly and packaging processes. Headquartered in Singapore, the company is committed to delivering high-performance, scalable solutions that enable its customers to achieve operational success and push the boundaries of semiconductor manufacturing technology.
